product_definition.title: Procedural Level System
product_definition.description: A modular procedural level generation system for UE5.5. Uses room-and-corridor graph algorithms to assemble pre-authored room modules at runtime. Supports seed-based deterministic generation, difficulty scaling, and runtime navmesh rebuild.
product_definition.target_audience: Roguelite, dungeon crawler, and survival game developers

core_features: Room module DataAsset: bounds, door sockets, tags, weight
BSP-inspired graph solver: place rooms, connect with corridors
Door socket snapping with alignment validation
Difficulty tier: modifies room pool weights
Streamed room loading via Level Instances
Start room and end room (boss) guarantee

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Generator runs on BeginPlay, player spawns in start room, corridors connect 8 rooms
